calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Terms Of Trust And Final Distribution And Termination Of Trust.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Debra Kasper for Borel Private Bank (Petitioner). David Talbot (Objector) in Pro Per. Christina Nelson for Judy Rostron (Beneficiary). John Leutza (Guardian Ad Litem) for the Minors/Unborn Children.

Mr. Talbot stated that he sent copies of the objections, but got no response. Ms. Nelson expressed that Mr. Talbot wanted to continue maintaining the property and that it was not in the terms of the trust. Ms. Nelson stated that the trust only gave rights to the William and Frederick Talbot families. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Modifying Terms Of Trust And Final Distribution And Termination Of Trust.
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Continued To Nov-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Modifying Terms Of Trust And Final Distribution And Termination Of Trust.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Continued To Sep-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Charles Stephenson appearing for Borel Bank.
Mr. Stephenson reported that all parties have reached an agreement. The Court directed Mr. Stephenson to submit the agreement and order for review. Mr. Stephenson informed the Court that all parties have aqreed to choose order #1. The Court took the matter under submission. If the Court is not satisfied with the agreement, the matter will be continued to 09/25/07.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera
